name: styling_css_stack
description: CSS practices — custom properties (design tokens), naming (BEM / CSS Modules), responsive, transitions, z-index scale, dark mode, a11y (focus-visible, prefers-reduced-motion, forced-colors). DO/DON'T examples. Activate with writing or review CSS/Less/Sass, with refactoring styles, or with questions «how correctly style X».
default_prompt: Use $styling_css_stack when the task matches the "Styling (CSS Stack) Beast Practices" skill.
triggers: CSS practices — custom properties (design tokens), naming (BEM / CSS Modules), responsive, transitions, z-index scale, dark mode, a11y (focus-visible, prefers-reduced-motion, forced-colors)
